commands.review_summary:
The branch adds inline JSDoc and explanatory comments for embedded agent runner contracts across trajectory, compaction, tool construction, run decisions, prompt/runtime context, startup timing, bootstrap, Tool Search, abort, LLM boundary, idle-timeout, async-task, message-merge, queue, sessions-yield, and failover helpers.

PR surface: Source +589. Total +589 across 29 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an inline documentation/comment PR, not a bug report with a runtime reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR has the protected `maintainer` label and no narrow repair target; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and CI/merge judgment.

target.title: docs: document embedded trajectory contracts
target.body:
## Summary

- Document terminal trajectory status/error semantics and visible-progress classification inputs.
- Clarify committed messaging delivery evidence and non-deliverable tool-use handling.
- Document trajectory recorder diagnostic reads and bounded cleanup flush behavior.
- Document compaction timeout grace/snapshot recovery semantics and mid-turn precheck signal handling.
- Document embedded tool construction allowlist and bundled-runtime gate contracts.
- Document embedded run-decision auth, hook, lock, provider, and transcript-policy contracts.
- Document embedded prompt-build hook, prompt repair, cache-boundary, and after-turn context contracts.
- Document embedded runtime-context prompt splitting and hidden context message contracts.
- Document embedded startup stage timing and slow-summary logging contracts.
- Document embedded bootstrap routing, context placement, and workspace remapping contracts.
- Document embedded Tool Search allowlist, replay, and empty-allowlist validation contracts.
- Document embedded abort wrapper and abort-settle timeout contracts.
- Document embedded LLM boundary normalization and prompt transform contracts.
- Document embedded system prompt build and raw-model prompt suppression contracts.
- Document embedded idle-timeout breaker and stream watchdog contracts.
- Document embedded completion-required async task waiting contracts.

- Document embedded message merge strategy contracts.

- Document embedded context-engine helper contracts.

- Document embedded incomplete-turn contracts.

- Document embedded queue-message contracts.

- Document embedded failover-policy contracts.

- Document embedded assistant-failover contracts.

- Document embedded Codex app-server recovery contracts.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-status.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-flush-cleanup.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/compaction-timeout.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.run-decisions.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.transcript-policy.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.prompt-helpers.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/runtime-context-prompt.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-stage-timing.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.bootstrap-routing.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.bootstrap-context.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/abortable.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.llm-boundary.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-system-prompt.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/llm-idle-timeout.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/idle-timeout-breaker.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.async-tasks.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/message-merge-strategy.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/transcript-repair-runtime-contract.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-injection.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.transcript-policy.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.queue-message.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/failover-policy.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/assistant-failover.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.codex-app-server-recovery.test.ts`

## Real Behavior Proof

Behavior addressed: Embedded trajectory, compaction/precheck, tool construction, run-decision, prompt-helper, runtime-context prompt, stage-timing, bootstrap routing, Tool Search planning, abort helper, LLM boundary, system-prompt, idle-timeout, async-task, and message-merge contracts now explain terminal trajectory status/error distinction, visible-progress classification inputs, committed messaging delivery evidence, recorder diagnostic state reads, bounded trajectory flush cleanup behavior, compaction timeout recovery, mid-turn overflow signaling, runtime toolsAllow filtering, forced message-tool allowlists, bundled runtime creation gates, session write-lock timing, auth provenance, hook suppression, message-tool provider selection, transcript-policy fallback, prompt hook merging, prompt repair, cache-boundary additions, after-turn runtime context construction, runtime-context prompt splitting, hidden context message construction, startup timing diagnostics, BOOTSTRAP.md context placement, workspace context-file remapping, Tool Search auto-added controls, replay-safe tool names, AbortError normalization, abort-settle timeout overrides, provider-boundary replay normalization, runtime-context insertion, temporary model-prompt transforms, raw-model system prompt suppression, idle-timeout breaker state transitions, stream setup/chunk watchdog behavior, and completion-required async task wait behavior, and orphaned trailing user prompt merge strategy behavior, assistant-stage failover action/error contracts, Codex app-server replay recovery contracts.

Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout on branch `codex/embedded-trajectory-comments-20260602`, created from current `main` after PR #88554 merge commit `85beee613c64ec4863e7569027bddbfef7498861` was present.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check`; `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-status.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-flush-cleanup.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/compaction-timeout.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.run-decisions.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.transcript-policy.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.prompt-helpers.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/runtime-context-prompt.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-stage-timing.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.bootstrap-routing.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.bootstrap-context.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/abortable.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.llm-boundary.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-system-prompt.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/llm-idle-timeout.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/idle-timeout-breaker.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.async-tasks.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/message-merge-strategy.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/transcript-repair-runtime-contract.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/assistant-failover.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.codex-app-server-recovery.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: Branch commits through `86a64cd3f36` change only focused embedded comment/JSDoc surfaces; whitespace checks passed; targeted trajectory, compaction, tool-construction, run-decision, transcript-policy, prompt-helper, runtime-context, stage-timing, bootstrap, Tool Search, abort, LLM-boundary, system-prompt, idle-timeout, async-task, message-merge, context-engine, incomplete-turn, queue-message, sessions-yield, failover-policy, auth-profile failure policy, assistant-failover, and Codex app-server recovery tests passed locally.

Observed result after fix: Trajectory proof passed 138 tests across 2 Vitest shards; compaction/precheck proof passed 69 tests across 2 Vitest shards; tool-construction proof passed 21 tests in 1 Vitest shard; run-decision proof passed 12 tests across 2 Vitest shards; prompt-helper proof passed 12 tests in 1 Vitest shard; runtime-context prompt proof passed 21 tests in 1 Vitest shard; stage-timing proof passed 5 tests in 1 Vitest shard; bootstrap proof passed 10 tests across 2 Vitest shards; Tool Search planning proof passed 8 tests in 1 Vitest shard; abort helper proof passed 8 tests in 1 Vitest shard; LLM-boundary proof passed 11 tests in 1 Vitest shard; system-prompt proof passed 4 tests in 1 Vitest shard; idle-timeout proof passed 84 tests across 2 Vitest shards; async-task proof passed 7 tests in 1 Vitest shard; message-merge proof passed 8 tests across 2 Vitest shards; diff checks stayed clean; assistant-failover proof passed 14 tests in 1 Vitest shard; diff checks stayed clean; Codex app-server recovery proof passed 10 tests in 1 Vitest shard; diff checks stayed clean.

What was not tested: Full repository check suite and GitHub CI were not run locally.
